Tweedy, Browne Enters the ETF Market With the Tweedy, Browne Insider + Value ETF (NYSE Ticker: COPY)

holdings.infoBox: COPY is an equity ETF with a total of 422 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Tweedy Browne Insider + Value ETF Trust Units (COPY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that selects undervalued equities globally using a proprietary methodology. It focuses on companies where insiders, defined as corporate officers, are actively purchasing equity securities and where the company is conducting share buybacks COPY was launched on Dec 27, 2024 and is issued by Tweedy, Browne Co.
